channel.title: information retrieval on Sukai Huang
channel.description: Recent content in information retrieval on Sukai Huang

item.title: S_teufel Argumentative Zoning 2000
item.description: [TOC] Title: Argumentative Zoning Author: Simone Teufel Publish Year: 2000 Review Date: Feb 2022 https://www.cl.cam.ac.uk/~sht25/az.html Summary Abstract We present a new type of analysis for scientific text which we call Argumentative Zoning. We demonstrate that this type of text analysis can be used for generating user-tailored and task-tailored summaries and for performing more informative citation analyses. We also demonstrate that our type of analysis can be applied to unrestricted text, both automatically and by humans.
